displayDescription.zh: Dropout 通过在训练中随机移除神经元，让大型神经网络更不容易过拟合。每个小批量近似训练一个变薄的网络，测试时预测则近似集成。这个思想后来成为深度学习工具包里的标准正则化方法。
displayDescription.en: Dropout made overfitting less dangerous in large neural networks by randomly removing units during training. Each minibatch effectively trains a thinned network, while test-time prediction approximates an ensemble. The idea became a standard regularizer across deep learning toolkits.

description.en: Primary JMLR source; local images redraw masks and model averaging.
description.zh: 《机器学习研究杂志》 原始论文；本地图重画掩码和模型平均。

license.en: Reference link only; local images are redrawn and do not reuse publisher figures.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地图片为重绘，不复用出版方图形。

action.zh: 打开 《机器学习研究杂志》 论文

html.zh: 随着网络变大，记忆训练集成为实际问题。Dropout 提供了不必改变数据集的简单干预方式。
html.en: As networks grew larger, memorization became a practical training problem. Dropout offered a simple intervention that did not require changing the dataset.

html.zh: 核心思想是在训练时随机隐藏单元，使隐藏特征不能过度依赖彼此。 关键机制是随机变薄网络进行正则化，它把资料线索与可见的演示行为连接起来。
html.en: The core idea is to hide random units during training so hidden features cannot rely too strongly on each other. The key mechanism is Randomly thinned networks for regularization, which links the source material to the visible demo behavior.

html.zh: 专家通常把 Dropout 视为简单有效的正则化思想，但其价值取决于架构和规模。它的长期影响在于训练时引入噪声这一原则，如今常与归一化、数据增强和其他正则化方法一起讲解。
html.en: Experts generally treat dropout as a simple and effective regularization idea whose value depends on architecture and scale. Its long-term legacy is the training-time noise principle, now taught alongside normalization, augmentation, and other regularizers.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量生成的 variant；展示层默认不覆盖 legacy。

role.en: First author of the JMLR dropout paper
role.zh: 《机器学习研究杂志》 Dropout 论文第一作者
共同作者，深度学习先驱

workTitle.en: Dropout: A Simple Way to Prevent Neural Networks from Overfitting
workTitle.zh: Dropout：防止神经网络过拟合的简单方法

workAuthors.en: Nitish Srivastava, Geoffrey Hinton, Alex Krizhevsky, Ilya Sutskever, Ruslan Salakhutdinov, JMLR, 2014
workAuthors.zh: 尼蒂什·斯里瓦斯塔瓦, 杰弗里·辛顿, 亚历克斯·克里热夫斯基, 伊利亚·苏茨克维, 鲁斯兰·萨拉胡丁诺夫, 《机器学习研究杂志》, 2014

quoteAttribution.zh: 《Dropout：防止神经网络过拟合的简单方法》, 尼蒂什·斯里瓦斯塔瓦, 杰弗里·辛顿, 亚历克斯·克里热夫斯基, 伊利亚·苏茨克维, 鲁斯兰·萨拉胡丁诺夫, 《机器学习研究杂志》, 2014

method.zh: 随机变薄网络进行正则化

material.zh: 《机器学习研究杂志》 论文与框架文档

demo.en: Mask units in training, scale predictions at test time
demo.zh: 训练时遮蔽单元，测试时缩放预测

text.en: Each update keeps only a sampled subset of units active.
text.zh: 每次更新只保留采样出的部分单元活跃。

text.en: Dropout discourages features from relying on exact partners being present.
text.zh: Dropout 阻止特征过度依赖某些固定伙伴同时存在。

text.en: Test-time scaling approximates averaging many thinned networks.
text.zh: 测试时缩放近似于平均许多变薄网络。
